items.title: Precision/Recall/F1
items.description: Precision, recall, and F1 are ratios built from TP, FP, TN, and FN at one threshold. This topic owns the four counts and 2×2 layout; Precision/Recall/F1 owns the metric formulas, F1 trade-offs, and PR curves.

items.title: ROC-AUC
items.description: Each point on an ROC curve comes from TP, FP, TN, FN at one threshold. ROC-AUC sweeps cutoffs and plots TPR vs FPR; this topic fixes one cutoff and inspects the full error breakdown.

items.title: Logistic Regression
items.description: Logistic regression outputs P(y=1|x) via sigmoid. Apply a threshold to those probabilities to get hard labels, then build the confusion matrix on held-out data. Logistic Regression owns training and predict_proba; this topic owns evaluation at a chosen cutoff.

items.title: Regression vs Classification
items.description: Confusion matrices apply only to classification — discrete predicted labels compared to discrete true labels. Regression predicts continuous numbers and uses MAE/RMSE instead; choose classification problem type before TP/FP/TN/FN apply.
